title: Visa Card Payment - How It Works
content: Visa cards enable secure payments worldwide. When you use your Visa card: 1) The transaction is processed through Visa's network, 2) Funds are transferred from your account to the merchant, 3) The transaction appears on your account statement. Visa cards include built-in fraud protection and are accepted at millions of locations. For contactless payments, simply tap your card at the reader. For online purchases, provide your card details securely on encrypted checkout pages.
